title: AgroStar Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: AgroStar Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the AgroStar Global Group family as a Full Stack Developer in Dhanbad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AgroStar Global Group:
AgroStar Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AgroStar Global Group!
